name: rapp-body
_note: Keyless organism. Per rapp/1 (RAPP/specs/SPEC.md §2.3; ratified schema name, Constitution Art. LIV, formerly rapp-rappid/2.0) and the bond.py mint idiom, the 64-hex tail is hashlib.sha256(uuid.uuid4().bytes).hexdigest() — a stable, opaque JOIN KEY, NOT sha256('<owner>/<slug>'). The kind lives in this record, not the string. rapp-body holds no master keypair, so identity is UUID-anchored (keyed organisms would anchor on sha256(master_pubkey_SPKI)). Chain integrity for the frames comes from the sha256 payload links; a keypair signature is OPTIONAL and omitted.
